stonetop.summary: A mad archon who guards the Utterwell against the Things Below.

system.concept: A mad archon who guards the Utterwell against the Things Below.
system.description: They are an archon, forged by the First Creators to stand vigil over the Utterwell and act as a bulwark against the Things Below: Tcaventes, Shackle and Key, a flawless guardian. Or at least, they were. Over eons even they succumbed to the whispers of the Things Below; the corruption brings lapses of discipline that let their charges' influence seep out through the Deeps, and amplifies a guilt so great it drives Tcaventes to a denial strong enough to drive them mad. On their throne they seem focused and stern; met wandering the Deeps, they are aimless and unravelling, and the PCs must walk a razor's edge to avoid their wrath.
